patterns.pattern: Early endpoint creators capture disproportionate market share
patterns.evidence: First 50 endpoints on x402 average 10x more transactions than positions 200+
patterns.action: Deploy endpoints immediately — first-mover window closing Q2 2026

patterns.pattern: Agent buyers prefer structured JSON over PDF for machine consumption
patterns.evidence: API endpoints receive 50x more automated traffic than document downloads
patterns.action: Prioritize API endpoints over document products for agent market

patterns.pattern: Micro-pricing ($0.10-$2.00) outperforms higher price points for new endpoints
patterns.evidence: Sub-$2 endpoints achieve 10x adoption rate vs $5+ endpoints in first 30 days
patterns.action: Launch at $0.25-$1.00, raise prices after proving value
